title: Constant Contact vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Constant Contact vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, ratings, and find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: Constant Contact vs Sendinblue: Detailed Comparison
intro: Constant Contact and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are two established email marketing platforms with different strengths. Constant Contact excels for nonprofits and local businesses seeking integrated marketing tools, while Sendinblue is better suited for transactional email and multi-channel campaigns. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your business needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Event management, social ads, e-commerce integration
comparison_table.tool_b: Transactional API, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, chat

choose_a_if: You need built-in event management and social media advertising features
You're a nonprofit or local business looking for specialized marketing tools
You want tighter e-commerce integration with your email campaigns
choose_b_if: You want to start free and scale as your business grows
You need transactional email, SMS, WhatsApp, and chat all in one platform
You're looking for better customer support and higher user satisfaction ratings

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Sendinblue?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Sendinblue has better overall ratings, a free tier, and more integrated communication channels, making it superior for most users. However, Constant Contact excels for nonprofits and small businesses that prioritize event management and social media integration.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is significantly cheaper for startups and small businesses, as it offers a free plan supporting up to 100,000 subscribers. Constant Contact has no free tier and starts at $12/month, but paid Sendinblue plans begin at $25/month—making pricing comparable once you upgrade.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export and import features. You can typically export your contact lists and campaign data from Sendinblue and import them into Constant Contact. However, you should review each platform's migration documentation to ensure a smooth transition.
